---
title: "Cuong Nguyen"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    number-sections: false
include-after-body:
  text: <script type="text/javascript" src="js/fetch_orcid.js"></script>
---

::: {.grid .gap-0 .row-gap-0 .column-gap-2}

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-9 .g-col-lg-9 .ms-0 .mb-0 .pb-0}

::: {.grid .row-gap-0}
::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4 .ms-0 .mb-0 .pb-0}
[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.co.uk/citations?user=eAkq43kAAAAJ){.btn .btn-outline-success .w-100}
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-6 .g-col-lg-4 .ms-0 .mb-0 .pb-0}
[<i class="bi bi-linkedin"></i> LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/cuong-c-nguyen){.btn .btn-outline-success .w-100}
:::
:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-12}
I am a *Lecturer in People-centred AI* at the Centre for Vision, Speech and Signal Processing, University of Surrey.

My research focuses on probabilistic machine learning, uncertainty modelling, and AI systems that support human decision-making.
:::

:::

::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-md-3 .g-col-lg-3 .ms-3 .mb-0 .pb-0 .text-center}
![](img/cuong.png){fig-alt="Cuong's photo" style="border-radius: 50%; max-width: 200px;"}
:::

:::

## &#128218; Publications

Please refer to my Google Scholar, or click the button below to retrieve the list of my publications from ORCID.

<button id="fetch-button" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-success">Show publications</button>
<div id="publication-list"></div>
<button id="load-more-btn" type="button" class="btn btn-outline-success" style="display:none;" onclick="fetchMorePublications()">Display More</button>

## <i class="bi bi-bluesky text-primary"></i> News

::: {#my-bsky-feed .lozad style="min-height: 300px;"}
:::
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/lozad/dist/lozad.min.js"></script>

<script>
  const observer = lozad('#my-bsky-feed', {
    load: function(el) {
      // 1. Import the Bluesky script module
      const script = document.createElement('script');
      script.type = 'module';
      script.src = "https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/bsky-embed/dist/bsky-embed.es.js";
      document.head.appendChild(script);

      // Add the component attributes
      el.innerHTML = `
        <bsky-embed
          username="probabilita.bsky.social"
          limit="3"
          disable-images="false"
          disable-videos="false"
          disable-autoplay="true"
          load-more="true"
          date-format='{"type":"absolute","locale":"en-GB","options":{"year":"numeric", "month":"short", "day":"numeric"}}'
          custom-styles="img.rounded-full { display: none; } span.font-bold {display: none;}"
        ></bsky-embed>`;
      console.log("Bluesky feed lazily loaded.");
    }
  });
  observer.observe();
</script>
